texto: We love our planet Earth. We should - it is our home, and there's no place like home. There can't ever be a better place than Earth.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Dimitar Sasselov: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “We love our planet Earth. We should - it is our home, and there's no place like home. There can't…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love, earth pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de earth e better.

frase_original: We love our planet Earth. We should - it is our home, and there's no place like home. There can't ever be a better place than Earth.

texto: The question we ask is - if there is life on other planets, should we expect it to be based on the same molecules, i.e. be universal - or should we expect it to depend on the local conditions, i.e. on the planet's geochemistry. So to find out, we try experiments on biomolecules, starting with such geochemistry conditions.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Dimitar Sasselov sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “The question we ask is - if there is life on other planets, should we expect it to be based on th…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, try, find, útil em momentos de termino e try.

frase_original: The question we ask is - if there is life on other planets, should we expect it to be based on the same molecules, i.e. be universal - or should we expect it to depend on the local conditions, i.e. on the planet's geochemistry. So to find out, we try experiments on biomolecules, starting with such geochemistry conditions.
